title.zh: 这个 AI 修复能合并吗？SymPy Point2D 回归审查
title.en: Can this AI fix be merged? Reviewing a SymPy Point2D regression

summary.zh: 审查一个针对真实 SymPy 问题的 AI 补丁：它修好了 evaluate(False) 下的报错，但可能放过了非法的虚数坐标。
summary.en: Review an AI patch for a real SymPy issue: it fixes an evaluate(False) error, but may let invalid imaginary coordinates through.

reviewTarget.note: The reviewed patch is adapted from the CodeStory plausible-but-incorrect patch described in the PatchDiff paper. It is not the SymPy maintainer patch that was merged upstream.
